en: My son, if you receive my words and treasure up my commandments with you,
zh: 我兒，如果你接受我的話， 把我的誡命珍藏在心裡，

en: making your ear attentive to wisdom and inclining your heart to understanding;
zh: 留心聽智慧， 致力求聰明；

en: yes, if you call out for insight and raise your voice for understanding,
zh: 如果你為求哲理而呼喊， 為求聰明而揚聲；

en: if you seek it like silver and search for it as for hidden treasures,
zh: 如果你尋找它如同尋找銀子， 搜尋它好像搜尋寶藏；

en: then you will understand the fear of the LORD and find the knowledge of God.
zh: 你就明白怎樣敬畏耶和華， 並且獲得對 神的認識。

en: For the LORD gives wisdom; from his mouth come knowledge and understanding;
zh: 因為耶和華賜人智慧， 知識和聰明都出自他的口。

en: he stores up sound wisdom for the upright; he is a shield to those who walk in integrity,
zh: 他為正直人珍藏大智慧， 給行為完全的人作盾牌；

en: guarding the paths of justice and watching over the way of his saints.
zh: 為要看顧正直人的路徑， 護衛虔誠人的道路。

en: Then you will understand righteousness and justice and equity, every good path;
zh: 這樣，你就明白公義、公正、正直， 以及一切善道。

en: for wisdom will come into your heart, and knowledge will be pleasant to your soul;
zh: 智慧必進入你的心， 知識必使你歡悅。

en: discretion will watch over you, understanding will guard you,
zh: 明辨的能力必護衛你， 聰明必看顧你；

en: delivering you from the way of evil, from men of perverted speech,
zh: 要救你脫離邪惡的道路， 脫離說話乖謬的人。

en: who forsake the paths of uprightness to walk in the ways of darkness,
zh: 那些人離棄正道， 走上黑暗的道路。

en: who rejoice in doing evil and delight in the perverseness of evil,
zh: 他們喜歡行惡， 喜悅惡人的乖謬。

en: men whose paths are crooked, and who are devious in their ways.
zh: 他們的道路彎曲， 他們的行徑偏離正道。

en: So you will be delivered from the forbidden woman, from the adulteress with her smooth words,
zh: 智慧要救你脫離淫婦， 脫離說諂媚話的妓女。

en: who forsakes the companion of her youth and forgets the covenant of her God;
zh: 她離棄年輕時的配偶， 忘記了 神的約；

en: for her house sinks down to death, and her paths to the departed;
zh: 她的家陷入死地， 她的路徑下落陰間。

en: none who go to her come back, nor do they regain the paths of life.
zh: 凡是進到她那裡去的，都不能轉回， 必得不著生路。

en: So you will walk in the way of the good and keep to the paths of the righteous.
zh: 因此，智慧必使你走在良善人的道上， 持守義人的路。

en: For the upright will inhabit the land, and those with integrity will remain in it,
zh: 因為正直人必在地上安居， 完全人必在世上存留；

en: but the wicked will be cut off from the land, and the treacherous will be rooted out of it.
zh: 但惡人必從地上除滅， 行事奸詐的必從世上拔除。
